quote.text: You cannot teach a man anything. You can only help him discover it within himself.
quote.author: Galileo Galilei

program_overview: Train the trainer program is a capacity building intervention for trainers or facilitators. We all want our training programs to appeal to a diverse training audience.
business_context: At Skillsbucket, we use powerful techniques and psychological approaches to help you design and deliver a training program that is simple yet impactful. We introduce you to basis pedagogical and teaching concepts to understand how people learn. We use well structured training material with comprehensive training notes. We train you through a lot of real life simulations and practice sessions.
benefits_of_ttt: Design result focused programs and PPTs
Identify the audience responses and reactions
Improve Group dynamics and handle hecklers
Video and audio recording for real time feedback

skillsbucket_competency_offerings.description: Two day Experiential program for the new facilitators to deliver impactful program keeping the audience energy levels high. Practical tips to look confident and present flawlessly.
Two day experiential program for the subject matter experts to understand the learners psychological set up to deliver effective programs.
Two day experiential program for internal trainers to understand the audience needs and delivery confidently.
